FailureMode.Name: Failure Mode
FailureMode.Hint: What happens to ingredients when a craft fails.
FailureMode.Time: Time cost only (cooldown, no ingredient loss)

CooldownSeconds.Name: Failure Cooldown (seconds)
CooldownSeconds.Hint: In-game seconds before a failed recipe can be attempted again. Default 86400 = 24 hours.

PlayersCanChangeBench.Name: Players Can Change Bench
PlayersCanChangeBench.Hint: Allow players to switch bench type freely in the Crafting Window.

RecipeManager.Title: Recipe Manager
RecipeManager.SelectOrNew: Select a recipe or create a new one.
RecipeManager.UnsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
RecipeManager.ConfirmDelete: Delete this recipe? This cannot be undone.

CraftingWindow.Title: Crafting
CraftingWindow.NoRecipes: No recipes available at this bench.

Craft.MissingSchematic: You don't have the required schematic.
Craft.BadIngredientUUID: Ingredient item could not be found (UUID: {uuid}).

Chat.RollPrompt: {actor} is attempting {recipe} — {skill} vs DC {dc}. Please roll.

Macro.NoActor: No actor selected. Select a token or assign a character.
